description: Pure async Python library for multi-channel conversations with rooms, hooks, voice pipelines, AI channels, orchestration, and pluggable backends
rules: RoomKit is async-first. Always use `async def` and `await` for all operations.
Import: `from roomkit import RoomKit, TextContent, HookTrigger` for core types.
Channels: `SMSChannel('id', provider=...)`, `EmailChannel('id', provider=...)`.
AIChannel: `from roomkit.channels.ai import AIChannel`.
All files start with `from __future__ import annotations`.
Flow: register_channel -> create_room -> attach_channel -> process_inbound.
AI channels: `category=ChannelCategory.INTELLIGENCE` when attaching.
BEFORE_BROADCAST hooks are SYNC (block/modify). AFTER_BROADCAST are ASYNC (fire-and-forget).
HookResult: `.allow()`, `.block(reason)`, `.modify(event)`.
Use mock providers for testing: MockAIProvider, MockSTTProvider, MockVoiceBackend.
Pydantic: use `model_copy(update={...})`, never mutate directly.
Voice pipeline: Resampler->Recorder->AEC->AGC->Denoiser->VAD->Diarization+DTMF.
Orchestration: Pipeline, Swarm, Supervisor, Loop strategies.
Python 3.12+. Use `X | None`, not `Optional[X]`.
Voice lazy loaders: `from roomkit.voice import get_deepgram_provider`.
71 top-level exports. Providers import from subpackages.
Zero deps beyond pydantic>=2.9. Optional extras: roomkit[voice], roomkit[anthropic].
Test: `uv run pytest`. asyncio_mode=auto, no @pytest.mark.asyncio needed.
Interruption: IMMEDIATE, CONFIRMED, SEMANTIC, DISABLED strategies.
Join voice: `session = await kit.join(room_id, channel_id, participant_id=...)`.
